evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE multi-agent governance API — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+
model_description: Multi-agent governance orchestration system implementing Mechanical Ethics Assurance. Coordinates governance gates, artifact assurance, HITL approval, and claim boundary enforcement.
evaluation_methodology: Structured gate-by-gate functional evaluation against AEM-EVOLVE v2.0 acceptance criteria. 14/14 gates PASS, 140/140 checks PASS.
capability_declarations: Governed change assurance with immutable audit trail
HITL enforcement via HMAC and OIDC RS256 dual-path
Artifact hash verification through AEM v1.1
Triple Anchor public anchoring for selected artifacts
known_limitations: LLM advisory layer is optional, not mandatory governance path
PostgreSQL not tested against live database in controlled verifier
HITL signing key is file-based, not HSM-backed
External independent reproductions: 0 received as of 2026-05-12
Not regulatory approved, not externally certified
